product_overview: GestorGanadero is a Blazor WebAssembly administrative web app that bridges daily livestock operational events and ERP accounting by translating biological events into double-entry accounting drafts and providing a validation/ledger gateway before ERP synchronization. The core 1.0 release focuses on secure multi-tenant operation, incoming catalog sync from Gestor Max, dynamic event templates, fast field event capture and a drafts/ledger validation console (see PRD pages 1-3 for executive summary and architecture).
core_goals: Eliminate operational friction by enabling fast, validated daily event capture without requiring operators to be accounting experts.
Guarantee data integrity by ensuring all output to the ERP satisfies double-entry accounting rules and client-specific account hierarchies.
Provide strict tenant isolation with a tenant selector injecting tenant context into every request.
Maintain up-to-date enterprise catalogs by synchronizing incoming data from Gestor Max into tenant-scoped JSONB stores.
Expose a validation and approval gateway (ledger of drafts) so only consolidated, balanced accounting entries are sent to the ERP.

features.name: Authentication & Multi-Tenant Context
features.description: User authentication using the app's JWT mechanism and selection of active tenant to scope all operations and API calls.
user_flows: Navigate to /welcome -> Authenticate with valid credentials -> See authenticated state and tenant selector loaded -> Select tenant -> Observe tenant context applied across the app (data filtered to tenant)
Navigate to /welcome -> Attempt to authenticate with invalid credentials -> See error notification indicating authentication failed

features.name: Incoming Catalog Synchronization (Gestor Max → GestorGanadero)
features.description: Download and refresh tenant-specific catalogs (chart of accounts, cost centers, fields/lotes, animal categories) from Gestor Max and persist them as JSONB for use by templates and validation logic.
user_flows: Navigate to /catalogo -> Trigger catalog synchronization -> See progress indicator and recent sync metadata -> Observe refreshed catalogs (Fields, Activities, AnimalCategories, Lotes) available in lists
Navigate to /catalogo -> Trigger catalog synchronization -> Backend returns sync error -> See error notification and last sync error details shown in catalog configuration

features.name: Event Template Configurator (The Translator)
features.description: Create and manage event templates that map biological/operational event types to debit and credit account rules used to generate accounting drafts.
user_flows: Navigate to /centro-operativo -> Create a new event template and map debit and credit account rules -> Save template -> See template appear in the active templates list
Navigate to /centro-operativo -> Attempt to save a template missing required account mappings -> See validation error and prevent save

features.name: Daily Operational Event Registration (Fast Capture)
features.description: Register operational events (nacimientos, compra, pesaje, movimiento, etc.) using templates; capture required physical metadata (head count, kilos) and create draft accounting entries for validation.
user_flows: Navigate to /operaciones/nuevo -> Select event template -> Enter required physical metadata (head count, estimated weight, field/lote) -> Submit registration -> See event created with Draft status listed at /operaciones
Navigate to /operaciones/nuevo -> Submit registration missing required physical metadata -> See validation errors and prevent submission

features.name: Ledger & Validation Console (Accounting Drafts Gateway)
features.description: Inspect generated accounting drafts (streamed ledger), validate that Debe=Haber, and approve balanced drafts for synchronization to the ERP with transaction traceability.
user_flows: Navigate to /ledger -> See streamed ledger entries and draft accounting rows load -> Select one or more balanced drafts -> Approve and synchronize -> See confirmation with ERP transaction id and drafts status updated to Synced
Navigate to /ledger -> Select a draft that fails internal validation (unbalanced) -> See validation error preventing synchronization and details explaining the mismatch

features.name: Users Management (Invite / Edit / Remove)
features.description: Manage tenant users: invite new users, update roles, and delete users while preserving audit metadata and tenant isolation.
user_flows: Navigate to /usuarios -> Invite a new user by providing email and role -> See invited user appear in the users list with pending status
Navigate to /usuarios -> Attempt to invite a user with an email already present in the tenant -> See error notification and invitation is rejected

features.name: Catalog Administration (Fields, Activities, Animal Categories, Lotes)
features.description: Create, update and delete catalog entities (Fields, Activities, AnimalCategories, Lotes) that are used by templates and operational registrations; respect tenant/global visibility rules.
user_flows: Navigate to /catalogo -> Create new Field/Activity/AnimalCategory/Lote and assign tenant visibility -> Save entity -> See entity listed in the corresponding catalog
Navigate to /catalogo -> Attempt to delete an entity linked to existing events -> See error preventing deletion and explanatory message about existing dependencies

project.name: GestorGanadero
communication: gRPC (Grpc.AspNetCore 2.76.0) with gRPC-Web for browser compatibility

projects.name: GestorGanadero.Server
projects.type: ASP.NET Core Web API + gRPC server + EF Core

projects.name: GestorGanadero.Client.Tests
projects.type: xUnit test project (targets net7.0 - version mismatch)

entities.name: Tenant
entities.fields: Id, Name, ErpTenantId, CreatedAt, CreatedBy, UpdatedAt, UpdatedBy

entities.name: User
entities.fields: Id, Email, TenantId, Role, CreatedAt, CreatedBy, UpdatedAt, UpdatedBy

entities.name: AnimalCategory
entities.fields: Id, Name, ActivityId, TenantId (nullable=global), StandardWeightKg, Type, ExternalId, LastSyncedAt

entities.name: EventTemplate
entities.fields: Id, TenantId, Name, EventType, DebitAccountCode, CreditAccountCode, IsActive

entities.name: LivestockEvent
entities.fields: Id, TenantId, EventTemplateId, CostCenterCode, FieldId, LoteId, ActivityId, CategoryId, HeadCount, EstimatedWeightKg, WeightPerHead, TotalAmount, EventDate, Status, ErpTransactionId, Observations

entities.name: AccountingDraft
entities.fields: Id, TenantId, LivestockEventId, AccountCode, Concept, DebitAmount, CreditAmount, EntryType, HeadCount, WeightKg, WeightPerHead, FieldId

entities.name: GestorMaxConfig
entities.fields: Id, TenantId, GestorDatabaseId, ApiKeyEncrypted, ApiKeyLast4, BaseUrl, IsEnabled, LastTestedAt, LastTestOk, LastTestError

enums.name: UserRole
enums.values: Operator, Admin, Administrator, Auditor, Client, Guest

enums.name: EventType
enums.values: Nacimiento, Compra, Venta, Muerte, Sanidad, Alimentacion, Pesaje, Movimiento

pages.description: Home page - Template grid for quick event registration
Operations Center - Event templates, date-range filtering, recent events audit table
General Ledger - Pending ERP sync table, paginated ledger entries via gRPC streaming
Livestock Balance - Date range, field filter, category view filters
Maps & Cadastre - Leaflet dark-mode map, GeoJSON polygon drawing
GIS Infrastructure - Map with lot list sidebar, drawing mode
Administration - Sidebar nav switching between 5 admin sub-sections
Users Management - User table, invite drawer, delete
User Profile - Avatar, email, name, role, tenant selector

components.name: EventoDrawer.razor
components.description: Dynamic event registration drawer based on template fields

components.name: BalanceTreeTable.razor
components.description: Expandable tree table grouped by Field

server.name: LivestockEventService
server.description: CRUD for livestock events, validation, ERP commit

server.name: CatalogService
server.description: Full CRUD for Fields, Activities, AnimalCategories

server.name: LoteService
server.description: CRUD for Lotes with Activity M:N management

server.name: TranslationService
server.description: Core accounting logic - converts Draft events to AccountingDraft records

server.name: HttpContextTenantProvider
server.description: Reads tenant from X-Tenant-Id HTTP header

client.name: JwtDelegatingHandler
client.description: Adds Authorization header to HTTP requests

client.name: ReportingClientService
client.description: Wrapper for ReportingService gRPC client with IAsyncEnumerable streaming

client.name: AppStateContainer
client.description: Scoped state holding tenant, user, date range

multi_tenancy.query_filters: EF Core global query filters on all tenant-scoped entities
multi_tenancy.global_records: Activity and AnimalCategory with TenantId=null visible to all tenants

accounting_flow: TranslationService validates and generates double-entry AccountingDraft records

database_seeding.behavior: TRUNCATEs all tables on every startup (development mode)
database_seeding.source: data.sql files from various search paths

known_issues: Test project targets net7.0 while main projects target net10.0
Database seeding truncates all tables on startup
Balance report does not account for sales/deaths in weight calculation
